Leaf verification 2026-07-12 (scans n250/n284/n372/n374/n375/n452): C-A 25's leaves carry TWO page systems — original tomo pages (what the gap-read recorded as orig_page) and handwritten per-tomo leaf numbers (what Bancroft's footnotes cite). All 21 census attachments for this volume were page-joins across mismatched systems and are suspended until the volume's re-verification (queued). Case study: 'Prov. Rec., MS., ix. 122-3' (HoC II:90 n.21) had attached to the 1804 otter/presidio docs (d4/d6/d7/d8); the true document is Arrillaga's 28 Jun 1810 Suisun-campaign report at tomo leaves 122-123 = scans n374-375, now ca25-d37.
